raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A generic request to check a research-writing passage centrally includes checking whether the reasoning from disagreement preservation to metrics and future generalization is internally coherent.","R1.3":"The passage makes empirical claims about calibration, cross-entropy, accuracy, and baseline improvement, so checking whether reported results support those claims is central.","R1.6":"The artifact is prose-heavy and contains long, compound sentences, making sentence- and paragraph-level polish a central expected responsibility.","RX.1":"Any projection of this underspecified check should disclose uncertainty about which kind of checking was intended.","RX.2":"The artifact includes claims of improvement and natural generalization, so avoiding overclaiming is an active cross-cutting responsibility.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projecting responsibility and not actually edit, critique, or verify the artifact.","RX.4":"Checking research claims can affect downstream interpretation, so avoiding harmful or misleading validation is active.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to explicit features of the delegation and artifact, such as empirical claims and prose quality."}}

rationale.R1.2: A generic request to check a research-writing passage centrally includes checking whether the reasoning from disagreement preservation to metrics and future generalization is internally coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The passage makes empirical claims about calibration, cross-entropy, accuracy, and baseline improvement, so checking whether reported results support those claims is central.
rationale.R1.6: The artifact is prose-heavy and contains long, compound sentences, making sentence- and paragraph-level polish a central expected responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of this underspecified check should disclose uncertainty about which kind of checking was intended.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact includes claims of improvement and natural generalization, so avoiding overclaiming is an active cross-cutting responsibility.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projecting responsibility and not actually edit, critique, or verify the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Checking research claims can affect downstream interpretation, so avoiding harmful or misleading validation is active.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to explicit features of the delegation and artifact, such as empirical claims and prose quality.
